zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Alexander Drakes of Woodhall於1427年出生在英國越可爾時，他的父親Robert Drakes28歲，母親Eleanor Rokeley26歲。他於1462年與F Drax在英國英格蘭越可爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1501年8月10日在法國皮卡迪索姆享年74歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Alexander Drakes of Woodhall于1427年出生在英国越可爾时，他的父亲Robert Drakes28岁，母亲Eleanor Rokeley26岁。他于1462年与F Drax在英国英格兰越可爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1501年8月10日在法国皮卡迪索姆享年74岁。

nameMeanings.name: Drakes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Drake , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

English: habitational name from Drax (Yorkshire). The placename probably derives from Old English dræg ‘portage, place where boats are dragged’ or dræg ‘drag net’, influenced by Old Norse drag ‘portage’, with a plural drages being shortened to drags, Drax.
In some cases perhaps an Americanized form of some similar (like-sounding) cognate in some other language.

variants.name: Drake
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English drake, either ‘drake, male duck’ (compare Duck ) or ‘dragon’ (Old English draca ‘snake, dragon’ or the cognate Old Norse draki), including an emblematic dragon on a flag (compare Dragon ). Both the Old English and the Old Norse forms are from Latin draco ‘snake, monster’; its sense as a nickname is unclear but it may have had the sense ‘standard bearer’. The name was taken to Ireland in the 13th century and reinforced by later English settlers in the 17th century.
German: from Low German drake ‘dragon’, familiar as image on signboards, hence a topographic or habitational name referring to a house or inn with such signboard.
Dutch: variant, mostly Americanized and Flemish, of Draak, a cognate of 2 above, from draak (Middle Dutch drake) ‘dragon’.

nameMeanings.name: Alexander
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Alexander Drakes of Woodhall was born in 1427, in Yorkshire, England, his father, Robert Drakes, was 28 and his mother, Eleanor Rokeley, was 26. He married F Drax in 1462, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 10 August 1501, in Somme, Picardie, France, at the age of 74.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Alexander Drakes of Woodhall est né en 1427, à Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Robert Drakes, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Eleanor Rokeley, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé F Drax en 1462, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 10 août 1501, à Somme, Picardie, France, à l’âge de 74 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Alexander Drakes of Woodhall 1427 in Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Drakes 28 und seine Mutter Eleanor Rokeley 26. Er hat 1462 in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom F Drax geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 10. August 1501 im Alter von 74 Jahren in Somme, Picardie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Alexander Drakes of Woodhall è nato il nel 1427 nel Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Robert Drakes, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Eleanor Rokeley, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato F Drax nel 1462, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 10 agosto 1501, nel Somme, Picardie, Francia, all'età di 74 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Alexander Drakes of Woodhallが1427年にイギリスヨークシュアイアで生まれた時，父Robert Drakesは28歳，母Eleanor Rokeleyは26歳であった。1462年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアでF Draxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1501年8月10日にフランスピカーディソンメで74歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Alexander Drakes of Woodhall(이)가 1427년 영국 요르크실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Drakes(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor Rokeley(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1462년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 F Drax(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1501년 8월 10일 프랑스 피카디 솜에서 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Alexander Drakes of Woodhall nasceu em 1427, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert Drakes, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor Rokeley, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com F Drax em 1462, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 10 de agosto de 1501, em Somme, Picardie, França, com 74 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Alexander Drakes of Woodhall родился в 1427 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Drakes было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor Rokeley, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени F Drax в 1462 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 10 августа 1501 г. в местности сомм, пикарди, Франция в возрасте 74 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Alexander Drakes of Woodhall nació en 1427, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Drakes, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Eleanor Rokeley, tenía 26 años. Se casó con F Drax en 1462, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 10 de agosto de 1501, en Somme, Picardie, Francia, a la edad de 74 años.
